The Vault v0.2.6 adds the local client Workbench for Codex and Claude workflows.

Highlights:
- Adds a project workspace registry so projects can point at repositories outside the Vault repo.
- Adds shared project context packs for launching local client work with the right project brief.
- Adds copy-ready local launch specs for Codex and Claude clients.
- Adds the Vault Agent Workbench UI for projects, clients, generated commands, and recent runs.
- Adds Electron IPC/preload support for local workbench operations.
- Tracks local workbench run results and supports saving useful outcomes back into Vault memory.

This build packages the desktop app and the bundled `vault-memory` MCP sidecar runtime. After installing, open The Vault and use Settings -> Client setup to connect Codex, Claude Desktop, or Claude Code.
